description: Test deck showcasing all 6 blank slide recipes

slides.title: Blank Slide Recipe Showcase
slides.subtitle: Demonstrating all 6 layout recipes for blank slides | SettleMint

slides.title: DALP Architecture
slides.layer1_body: Asset Designer, Compliance Dashboard, Monitoring Console, Portfolio Tracker
slides.layer2_body: Token Lifecycle Engine, Compliance Rule Engine, OnchainID, Fee Manager
slides.layer3_body: REST APIs, Custody Connectors, XVP Settlement, Core Banking Adapters
slides.layer4_body: ERC-3643 tokens, 13 SMART extensions, Compliance Modules, Transfer Restrictions

slides.title: Onboarding in 4 Steps
slides.step1_body: Link your existing custody provider via standard API connectors
slides.step2_body: Define asset templates, compliance rules, and user roles
slides.step3_body: Deploy ERC-3643 tokens with full compliance enforcement
slides.step4_body: Monitor, service, and report across the full token lifecycle

slides.title: DALP by the Numbers
slides.stat1_body: Configurable compliance and token behavior modules, no custom dev required
slides.stat2_body: Bonds, deposits, stablecoins, equity, funds, real estate, precious metals
slides.stat3_body: High-availability deployment with multi-region failover and automated recovery
slides.stat4_body: From contract signature to live token issuance with a dedicated implementation team

slides.title: Build vs Buy
slides.left_body:
• 12-18 months minimum build time
• Dedicated blockchain and compliance engineering team required
• Ongoing maintenance burden for regulatory updates
• Custom audit trail implementation
• No institutional reference customers
• Full infrastructure ownership
slides.right_body:
• First issuance in under 4 weeks
• SettleMint team maintains compliance library
• Automatic updates for ERC-3643 standard changes
• Built-in audit trail and reporting
• Proven with global financial institutions
• SaaS or self-hosted options

slides.title: DALP Roadmap 2026
slides.milestone1_body: Cross-asset atomic settlement across custodians and blockchains
slides.milestone2_body: Automated coupon, dividend, and yield distribution for tokenized assets
slides.milestone3_body: NAV-linked tokenized fund issuance with subscription and redemption flows
slides.milestone4_body: Cross-chain asset transfer with unified compliance enforcement layer

slides.title: Core Platform Capabilities
slides.item1_body: Issuance, transfer, corporate actions, redemption, and burn — fully automated with compliance enforcement at every step
slides.item2_body: On-chain rule enforcement via SMART extensions. KYC/AML, transfer restrictions, holding limits, and investor eligibility
slides.item3_body: Connectors for Fireblocks, Metaco, Copper, and other institutional custodians via standardized API layer
slides.item4_body: Immutable audit trail, regulatory reporting templates, and real-time portfolio analytics for issuers and investors
slides.item5_body: ERC-735/ERC-734 compliant on-chain identity with verifiable claims from trusted claim issuers
slides.item6_body: Grafana dashboards, Loki log aggregation, Tempo tracing, and automated alerting for full-stack observability
